seoTitle: Mount Tarcoola vs Mount Walker — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Tarcoola and Mount Walker. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Tarcoola vs Mount Walker: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Tarcoola and Mount Walker.
heading: Mount Tarcoola vs Mount Walker — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Tarcoola, Western Australia and Mount Walker, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Walker has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Mount Tarcoola (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Tarcoola or Mount Walker safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Tarcoola has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Mount Walker scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Tarcoola scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Walker scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Tarcoola or Mount Walker?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Walker has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
